item.name: Iq Rrax Leaffish
item.description:
Able to disguise itself as a dead leaf, this wavekin plies the cenote in search of prey.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Some say this fish struck upon its disguise when a flood of ashen leaves flowed into the waters of Iq Rrax Tsoly from the Xobr'it Cinderfield. Certainly, to the untrained eye, this wavekin is all but indistinguishable from a charred, waterborne leaf.
